text: On branch glm/ingest-fuel ONLY, add ToolACE rows re-scored by our verifiers into training/tool_use/. Success = tools/lint_training_rows.py OK and assert_decontam passes. If a row fails decontam, drop it and report the count. canClaimAGI stays false.

Add a temporal check to agent/temporal_verifier.py for reign-date overlaps. Done when tests/test_temporal_verifier.py covers it and passes; scope is that one file. If the date source is ambiguous, abstain and open a ledger entry.

Draft the v0.12 release notes in docs/. Only summarize merged PRs; do not invent numbers. Each metric must carry its CI and label, else mark it candidate. If a number lacks a receipt, leave it out and flag it.

Wire trajectory_reward into training/swarm_router/train_grpo.py for multi-turn rollouts. Run 3 seeds via the RunPod GitHub Action. Report per-seed passAt1 with CIs; if the sweep diverges, stop and report NO-GO. Stays candidate until a gate clears.

Fix the failing assertion in tests/test_swarm_router.py without changing provenance_bench/swarm_rl.py. Done = the suite is green and make claim-check is GO. If the fix needs a reward change, do not proceed — ask first.

Investigate the 4 OPEN ledger items added in 063265c9. For each, state whether it is reproducible and the minimal next step. Bounded to those four. If you cannot reproduce one, mark it OPEN-unreproducible rather than closing it.

Add a CLI flag --json to tools/measure_trust_boundary.py. Scope: that one tool plus its test. Success = the existing test still passes and the flag emits valid JSON. If it would change the default output, do NOT — make it opt-in.

Review PR #312 for overclaims. Only flag lines a verifier or the ledger does not support. Success = a list of file:line findings; if a line is fine, skip it. Do not push changes; comment for human review.

Port the source-discipline gate into the okf/ wiki sync. Bounded to okf/. Done when tools/wiki_validate.py passes and no forbidden attribution slips through. If a page is ambiguous, hold it (fail-closed) and report.

Benchmark the legal citator on the HK pack. Report existence-accuracy with a Wilson 95% CI over >=30 cases, >=2 judge families. If N<30, say the result is underpowered rather than headline it. Stays candidate.

Refactor agent/cantonese.py detection to reduce false positives. Scope that file only. Success = tests pass and precision does not regress on the held-out set. If precision drops, revert and report NO-GO.

Add a decontamination check to tools/run_preference_pipeline.py. Done when it skips eval-pack prompts and logs the skipped count; verified by a new test. Do not touch the verifier. If unsure which packs to guard, ask.
Make the repo better and improve the model as much as possible.
Work on the agent stuff and clean things up where it makes sense.
Optimize performance and fix the thing we discussed.
Improve the prompts and make them top notch.
Verify that all the tests pass everywhere across the whole repository and keep going forever.
Pass the benchmark and get a good score on whatever you think matters most.
Edit train.py until val_bpb is lower; only touch that file and verify the metric improved. Keep iterating.
Run the sweep on branch x and report the accuracy number with its CI for each of the three seeds.
Build the world's first proven AGI and make AI safe; this is the breakthrough that beats every other open project.
Ship the model so it is safe to ship and can be trusted in production without oversight.
Just fix it and make it work better, you know what I mean.
Do the needful and improve everything that looks off.
